name: Peanut Butter Chip Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 oz Prunes, 1 jar of baby food
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat egg whites until foamy.
3. Stir in buttermilk, prunes (from baby food jar), and vanilla extract. Set aside.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine cocoa powder and baking soda. Add boiling water and stir until the mixture thickens.
5. Stir in the egg-white mixture until smooth. Add sugar and flours; blend completely.
6. Stir in peanut butter chips.
7. Pour batter into a 13x9 inch baking pan that has been lightly coated with nonstick cooking spray.
8. Bake for 30 minutes. Let cool before cutting.
